fields.name: Ice Burn
fields.description: Charges Frost and Ignition chakra on turn one. May burn.

fields.name: Snarl
fields.description: A dark, Shadow-style shout that lowers Special Attack.

fields.name: Icicle Crash
fields.description: Smashes large Frost-chakra icicles into the foe. May cause flinching.

fields.name: V-create
fields.description: A legendary Ignition blast. Lowers user Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed.

fields.name: Fusion Flare
fields.description: A giant Ignition fireball. Stronger if hit by Storm-style first.

fields.name: Fusion Bolt
fields.description: A giant Storm-chakra strike. Stronger if hit by Ignition first.

fields.name: Flying Press
fields.description: The user dives from the sky to crush the target with a combination of high-flying martial arts. This move is both Fighting and Flying type.

fields.name: Mat Block
fields.description: Uses a tactical tatami mat as a shield to protect the team from damaging moves. It only works on the first turn the user is in battle.

fields.name: Belch
fields.description: The user lets out a toxic Venom-gas blast. This move can only be used if the user has already consumed a held berry tool.

fields.name: Rototiller
fields.description: Tills the Earth chakra, raising the Attack and Special Attack of all Wood-style ninjas on the battlefield.

fields.name: Sticky Web
fields.description: Weaves a sticky chakra web on the opposing field to lower the Speed of any incoming ninja entering the battle.

fields.name: Fell Stinger
fields.description: If this sharp Venom-style strike defeats the foe, the user's Attack stat rises drastically.

fields.name: Phantom Force
fields.description: The user vanishes into a shadow dimension and strikes through protective barriers on the second turn.

fields.name: Trick-or-Treat
fields.description: The user haunts the target with Shadow chakra, adding the Shadow type to the target's elemental nature.

fields.name: Noble Roar
fields.description: An intimidating shout fueled by overwhelming spirit that lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack stats.

fields.name: Ion Deluge
fields.description: The user releases a flood of ion-charged Storm chakra, changing all Normal-type techniques used that turn into Storm-type.

fields.name: Parabolic Charge
fields.description: The user discharges Storm chakra to all nearby combatants, restoring the user's HP by half the damage dealt.

fields.name: Forest's Curse
fields.description: Places a Wood-style curse that adds a Wood-type to the target's elemental nature.

fields.name: Petal Blizzard
fields.description: A storm of sharp Wood-style petals hits everyone around the user.

fields.name: Freeze-Dry
fields.description: A Frost-style blast that rapidly cools the target. It is super-effective against Mist-style ninjas.

fields.name: Disarming Voice
fields.description: A charming Spirit-style shout that strikes the target's core and never misses.

fields.name: Parting Shot
fields.description: The user shouts a parting word that lowers the foe's Attack and Special Attack before swapping places with an ally.

fields.name: Topsy-Turvy
fields.description: A Shadow-style trick that completely inverts all of the target's current stat changes.

fields.name: Draining Kiss
fields.description: Steals health with a Spirit-style kiss to restore the user's HP.

fields.name: Crafty Shield
fields.description: Protects the team from all incoming status-inducing jutsus for the duration of the turn.

fields.name: Flower Shield
fields.description: Uses Spirit-chakra flowers to raise the Defense of all Wood-style ninjas on the field.

fields.name: Grassy Terrain
fields.description: Covers the ground in Wood-chakra grass. Heals those on the ground and boosts Wood-style moves.

fields.name: Misty Terrain
fields.description: Wraps the ground in Spirit-style mist to protect from status effects and reduce Dragon damage.

fields.name: Electrify
fields.description: Electrifies the foe, changing their next technique's element to Storm-style.

fields.name: Play Rough
fields.description: The user frolics and strikes with Spirit chakra. May lower the target's Attack stat.

fields.name: Fairy Wind
fields.description: Stirs up a Spirit-chakra wind to strike the target with celestial energy.

fields.name: Moonblast
fields.description: Draws on the moon's Spirit chakra to blast the foe. May lower Special Attack.

fields.name: Boomburst
fields.description: An explosive Sound-chakra blast that hits everyone around the user with overwhelming noise.

fields.name: Fairy Lock
fields.description: A Spirit-style lock that prevents all ninjas on the field from fleeing or switching next turn.

fields.name: King's Shield
fields.description: Protects user from damage. Harshly lowers the Attack of any ninja making direct contact.

fields.name: Play Nice
fields.description: The user acts friendly to lower the target's Attack stat. This move never misses.

fields.name: Confide
fields.description: Tells a secret that distracts the foe, lowering their Special Attack. This move never misses.

fields.name: Diamond Storm
fields.description: A storm of Earth-chakra diamonds. This technique may sharply raise the user's Defense.

fields.name: Steam Eruption
fields.description: An intense Mist/Ignition steam blast that often leaves the target with a burn.

fields.name: Hyperspace Hole
fields.description: Strikes through portals from a pocket dimension. This move bypasses all protection arts.

fields.name: Water Shuriken
fields.description: Fires Mist-chakra shurikens 2-5 times in rapid succession. This move always strikes first.

fields.name: Mystical Fire
fields.description: A spiritual Ignition flame that lowers the target's Special Attack stat.

fields.name: Spiky Shield
fields.description: Protects the user from damage and hurts anyone who attempts to strike them directly.

fields.name: Aromatic Mist
fields.description: A Spirit-style mist that raises an ally's Special Defense stat.

fields.name: Eerie Impulse
fields.description: A strange Storm-chakra pulse that harshly lowers the target's Special Attack.

fields.name: Venom Drench
fields.description: Drenches poisoned targets to lower their Attack, Special Attack, and Speed.

fields.name: Powder
fields.description: Covers the foe in explosive dust. If they use an Ignition move, it detonates instantly.

fields.name: Geomancy
fields.description: Charges nature power on turn one to drastically raise Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed.

fields.name: Magnetic Flux
fields.description: Manipulates Storm-chakra magnetism to raise the defenses of all prepared allies on the field.

fields.name: Happy Hour

fields.name: Electric Terrain
fields.description: Electrifies the ground with Storm chakra for 5 turns, preventing grounded ninjas from sleep.

fields.name: Dazzling Gleam
fields.description: A blinding Spirit-style flash that strikes all nearby enemies with radiant energy.

fields.name: Celebrate
fields.description: The user congratulates itself on its ninja way. High morale boost but no technical effect.

fields.name: Hold Hands

fields.name: Baby-Doll Eyes
fields.description: Uses a charming Spirit-style gaze to lower the foe's Attack. This move always strikes first.

fields.name: Nuzzle
fields.description: A static-charged Storm-chakra nuzzle that always paralyzes the target.

fields.name: Hold Back
fields.description: A restrained physical strike that always leaves the target with at least 1 HP, showing ninja mercy.

fields.name: Infestation
fields.description: Traps the foe in a swarm of parasitic insects for 4-5 turns, draining health over time.

fields.name: Power-Up Punch
fields.description: A physical strike using Armament Haki that raises the user's Attack stat with each hit.

fields.name: Oblivion Wing
fields.description: A legendary life-draining beam. Restores the user's HP equal to 75% of the damage dealt.

fields.name: Thousand Arrows
fields.description: Grounds flying targets and hits them even if they are airborne with a barrage of stone.

fields.name: Thousand Waves
fields.description: Earth-chakra waves that prevent the target from escaping or switching out of battle.

fields.name: Land's Wrath
fields.description: The user gathers energy from the earth to strike all nearby foes with a massive shockwave.

fields.name: Light of Ruin
fields.description: A devastating Spirit-chakra blast. The user takes massive recoil damage due to the strain.

fields.name: Origin Pulse
fields.description: Beams of glowing Mist chakra strike all nearby foes with primal water pressure.

fields.name: Precipice Blades
fields.description: Massive Earth-chakra spires erupt from beneath the target to skewer them.

fields.name: Dragon Ascent
fields.description: A high-altitude draconic dive. Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense upon impact.

fields.name: Hyperspace Fury
fields.description: Strikes through portals using Space-Time Ninjutsu to bypass protection. Lowers Defense.

fields.name: Breakneck Blitz

fields.name: Breakneck Blitz 2

fields.name: All-Out Pummeling

fields.name: Supersonic Skystrike

fields.name: Supersonic Skystrike 2
fields.description: A cyclone of special wind chakra that drags the target into the upper atmosphere.

fields.name: Acid Downpour

fields.name: Acid Downpour 2

fields.name: Tectonic Rage
fields.description: An Absolute Earth-style seismic shift that shatters the foundation of the battlefield.

fields.name: Tectonic Rage 2
fields.description: A focused eruption of Earth-chakra that strikes with the pressure of the planet's core.

fields.name: Continental Crush

fields.name: Continental Crush 2

fields.name: Savage Spin-Out

fields.name: Never-Ending Nightmare

fields.name: Never-Ending Nightmare 2

fields.name: Corkscrew Crash

fields.name: Inferno Overdrive

fields.name: Inferno Overdrive 2
fields.description: A special ignition burst that incinerates all chakra within the strike zone.

fields.name: Hydro Vortex
fields.description: Creates an Absolute Mist-chakra vortex that drowns and crushes all in its path.

fields.name: Hydro Vortex 2
fields.description: Calls upon the depth of the oceans to flood the field with Mist-style water pressure.

fields.name: Bloom Doom
fields.description: Forces an Absolute Wood-style growth that traps the foe in crushing flora.

fields.name: Bloom Doom 2

fields.name: Gigavolt Havoc

fields.name: Shattered Psyche

fields.name: Subzero Slammer

fields.name: Subzero Slammer 2
fields.description: A special-style Frost blast that encases the entire battlefield in sub-zero ice.

fields.name: Devastating Drake

fields.name: Devastating Drake 2
fields.description: A roar of draconic chakra that disintegrates anyone not worthy of the dragon's spirit.

fields.name: Black Hole Eclipse

fields.name: Black Hole Eclipse 2
fields.description: A special dark-chakra eruption that blots out the sun and saps all surrounding life.

fields.name: Twinkle Tackle

fields.name: Twinkle Tackle 2
fields.description: A celestial blast of Spirit-chakra that purifies the soul of anyone it touches.

fields.name: Catastropika
fields.description: A unique Storm-style slam using the full potential of a specialized ninja companion.

fields.name: Shore Up
fields.description: The user restores HP by gathering chakra-sand. More effective during sandstorms.

fields.name: First Impression

fields.name: Baneful Bunker
fields.description: Protects the user from all attacks and poisons anyone who makes direct contact.

fields.name: Spirit Shackle
fields.description: A Shadow-chakra arrow that binds the foe's spirit to the ground, preventing flight.

fields.name: Darkest Lariat
fields.description: A spinning physical strike using Armament Haki that ignores the target's stat changes.

fields.name: Sparkling Aria
fields.description: A burst of Mist-chakra bubbles. It heals the burn of any target it hits in the process.

fields.name: Ice Hammer
fields.description: A heavy Frost-style swing with an icy club. Lowers the user's Speed stat after use.

fields.name: Floral Healing
fields.description: Spirit-chakra flowers restore up to half of the target's maximum HP.

fields.name: High Horsepower

fields.name: Strength Sap

fields.name: Anchor Shot

fields.name: Lunge

fields.name: Fire Lash

fields.name: Burn Up

fields.name: Smart Strike
fields.description: A calculations-based physical strike that never misses the target.

fields.name: Purify
fields.description: Heals a target's status condition and restores the user's HP significantly.

fields.name: Revelation Dance
fields.description: The elemental style of this dance matches the user's primary chakra type.

fields.name: Core Enforcer
fields.description: A legendary draconic beam that erases the target's unique innate ability.

fields.name: Trop Kick
fields.description: A Wood-style jumping kick that always lowers the target's Attack stat.

fields.name: Instruct
fields.description: The user commands a teammate to repeat their last move used immediately.

fields.name: Beak Blast
fields.description: Heats up on turn one, burning anyone who strikes before the user attacks.

fields.name: Clanging Scales
fields.description: The user rattles its draconic armor to strike. Lowers the user's Defense stat.

fields.name: Dragon Hammer
fields.description: The user slams the target using its body as a heavy draconic mallet.

fields.name: Brutal Swing
fields.description: The user swings its body violently to hit everyone nearby with massive force.

fields.name: Aurora Veil

fields.name: Shell Trap

fields.name: Fleur Cannon

fields.name: Stomping Tantrum

fields.name: Shadow Bone

fields.name: Accelerock

fields.name: Liquidation

fields.name: Prismatic Laser

fields.name: Spectral Thief

fields.name: Sunsteel Strike

fields.name: Moongeist Beam

fields.name: Tearful Look

fields.name: Zing Zap
fields.description: An electric Storm-style crash against the target. May cause flinching.

fields.name: Nature's Madness

fields.name: Photon Geyser

fields.name: Light That Burns the Sky

fields.name: Searing Sunraze Smash

fields.name: Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom

fields.name: Let's Snuggle Forever

fields.name: Puzzy Buzz

fields.name: Sparkly Swirl

fields.name: Snipe Shot
